CustomField.description: Displays the payment on account record from which the cash is sourced to offset the receivable amount on the associated invoice. This field identifies the specific payment made in advance or on account, which is then applied towards clearing the receivable balance.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Displays the payment on account record from which the cash is sourced to offset the receivable amount on the associated invoice. This field identifies the specific payment made in advance or on account, which is then applied towards clearing the receivable balance
CustomField.label: Payment on Account-Applied
